youtube_action_lane.approval_basis: Mike approved the kept channel intro and requested an explicit upload/replacement action lane on 2026-05-28.

youtube_metadata.description:
Warnings usually appear before the break.
Cascade of Effects follows how signals, records, incentives, and design decisions turn into public failures.

Season 1 moves through Challenger, Therac-25, Hyatt Regency, Semmelweis, Piltdown Man, Tacoma Narrows, 737 MAX, and Titanic: eight stories about systems under pressure and the evidence people had before the outcome became obvious.

Subscribe for calm, evidence-led documentary essays on engineering failure, institutional risk, and the decisions that make warnings stop working.
youtube_metadata.title: Cascade of Effects: How Warnings Become Failures
